details: Implemented startFrogger() per spec. 14x13 grid with road zone (rows 7-11) containing cars, trucks, buses and river zone (rows 1-5) with logs and diving turtles. Discrete grid movement, riding mechanics, 5 home slots, timer countdown, forward-hop scoring, level progression with speed increase. Touch controls added. All acceptance criteria verified: game loads without errors, canvas 600x400, controls respond, vehicles/river objects move and wrap, frog rides logs/turtles, diving mechanic works, collision detection functional, home slot scoring works, game over/restart works, no hardcoded localhost, health API shows 7 games.
